Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Il Guercino

2 works in the gallery.

Damon and Pythias
by Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Il Guercino
Italy · 1611–1666 · Pen and brown ink
Saint Roch
by Giovanni Francesco Barbieri, called Il Guercino
Italy · 1611–1666 · Pen and brown iron gall ink with brush and brown wash on cream laid paper
